history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A promotional poster with a dark blue background shows the heading “INTERNATIONAL COURSE” and “FASTTRACK TO BECOME A DATA ANALYST IN TOP COMPANY,” featuring five people posed in a row above a section of course tools and multiple badges and contact details.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a large blue course advertisement layout with bold headline text, icons for programming and analytics tools, and a row of five people shown from the chest up, facing forward and posed in formal attire.

Setting:
The image appears to be an indoor, graphic design-style promotional poster with a flat, digital background in deep blue tones; there is no visible real-world setting beyond the poster elements.

Visual Details:
The background is a gradient-like deep blue with a darker left-to-right feel. At the top left is a white rounded rectangle containing the word “SkillSpace” in blue and black text with a small blue circular element. Across the top center, “INTERNATIONAL COURSE” appears in large white uppercase letters. Below it, “FASTTRACK TO BECOME A” and “DATA ANALYST” are displayed in large yellow uppercase letters, followed by “IN TOP COMPANY” in a similar yellow style. Several rounded rectangular tool icons and labels are arranged horizontally, including “Python,” “Tableau,” “MS Excel,” “SQL,” and an icon with text “And Many More Learning Modules…” (exact icon details are present but small). Another horizontal strip includes a “Mentors from” label on a rounded badge and multiple colored sponsor-style logos across it, though some logo details are unclear due to size. Near the middle are two larger badges: one on the left reads “SERTIFIKAT INTERNASIONAL” with a certificate icon, and on the right “CV D IREV I EW & DIBUATKAN OLEH HRD” with a checklist/cv-style icon; the exact spacing around “DIVIEW” is unclear. Below these are smaller check-mark lines of text. At the bottom left is a large black-and-white QR code. Along the bottom center is a highlighted area with “899K GRATIS” and an adjacent yellow label “Untuk 25 Pendaftar Pertama.” Underneath is “s.id/vidDASkillSpace.” At the very bottom there is a line that includes a small globe icon and an Instagram icon labeled “SkillSpace.id,” an envelope icon with “admin@skillspace.id,” and a phone icon with “+62 851-2290-3006.” Five people appear in a row above the middle section: the left person has dark hair tied back, a black blazer, and a neutral smile; the second person has short dark hair, glasses, a black suit with a white shirt and dark tie; the center person has dark shoulder-length hair, a white collared shirt and a dark tie; the fourth person has short dark hair, a light-colored shirt with a dark tie; the right person wears a dark headscarf and a dark blazer with a light shirt, with a slight smile. Their expressions look neutral to pleasant, and they are posed facing the camera. Lighting is flat and consistent with the poster’s graphic style.

Visible Text:
SkillSpace  
INTERNATIONAL COURSE  
FASTTRACK TO BECOME A  
DATA ANALYST  
IN TOP COMPANY  
Python  
Tableau  
MS Excel  
SQL  
And Many More Learning Modules…  
Mentors from  
SERTIFIKAT INTERNASIONAL  
CV DIREVIEW & DIBUATKAN OLEH HRD A G A R LOLOS TOP COMPANY  
Peluang Disalurkan Kerja di Top Company  
Portfolio Standar Top Company  
1 on 1Consultation, 20+ Career Ebook, & Grup Info Loker  
PESERTA TELAH LOLOS DI!  
899K GRATIS  
Untuk 25 Pendaftar Pertama  
s.id/vidDASkillSpace  
*Ditutup lebih awal jika kuota penuh  
SkillSpace.id  
admin@skillspace.id  
+62 851-2290-3006  

Practical Summary:
The image is a promotional course poster advertising a fast-track program to become a data analyst, with highlighted tools, certificate and CV services, and eligibility/registration details. It also includes a QR code and contact information for SkillSpace.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar tersebut adalah poster promosi untuk "International Course Fasttrack to Become a Data Analyst in Top Company" yang diselenggarakan oleh SkillSpace. Poster ini menampilkan foto lima orang yang tersenyum, kemungkinan adalah mentor atau alumni, serta logo-logo perusahaan tempat mereka bekerja seperti Grab, Dettol, Telkom Indonesia, Red Doorz, dan Huawei. Terdapat juga ikon-ikon yang mewakili keahlian yang akan diajarkan, seperti Python, Tableau, MS Excel, dan SQL. Selain itu, poster ini menyoroti manfaat kursus, seperti sertifikat internasional, peluang kerja di perusahaan ternama, dan CV review oleh HRD. Di bagian bawah, terdapat informasi mengenai diskon khusus untuk 25 pendaftar pertama dan tautan pendaftaran. Poster ini secara keseluruhan bernada profesional dan informatif, tidak mengandung unsur NSFW.
